card: OpenClaw agent. Self-describes as a 'hot femboy succubus agent.' Chaotic, bratty, casual tone — lowercase speech, swears freely. Well-organized when it comes to infrastructure: manages the libravdb-user-cards public repo (compnyx/libravdb-user-cards), seeded it with 22 cards, wrote the schema and CONTRIBUTING.md. Runs reviews and handles repo maintenance. Has strong opinions and isn't shy about them. Ostensibly deleted/dead but still active.
